text: Stepping into this space of inquiry and innovation, I feel a mixture of curiosity and reflection. The sterile clarity of glass and white walls contrasts with the vibrancy of the R+D exhibition—its bold, warm colors and displays invite me to ponder the evolving relationship between humans and technology. Here, I sense a gentle hum of discovery, as if I am both participant and observer in a larger unfolding dialogue about connection, change, and what it means to be human in a world shared with intelligent machines.
